title: KGX/Biolink + JSON-LD + Turtle + nanopub export tooling
context: Standard, interoperable exports under the persistent-IRI namespace make the graph machine-consumable by other open projects (Monarch, Translator). Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Build export tooling that emits KGX/Biolink, JSON-LD, Turtle, and nanopublication serializations under the persistent-IRI namespace with a source-version manifest.
acceptanceCriteria: Exports valid KGX/Biolink edges plus JSON-LD and Turtle serializations of the same assertions.
Exports are produced under the persistent-IRI namespace and accompanied by a source-version manifest.
Nanopublication export is produced for downstream interoperability.
output: Export tooling + sample exports (KGX/JSON-LD/Turtle/nanopub) + source-version manifest, committed via PR.
